source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution — McChesney, Covey, Huling, Thele, Walker
_comment: Test prompts in source language (with JP/zh-TW where the SKILL description explicitly lists those signals); field names + types in English. Activation judged solely from the description field. v0.2.0 adds audit-mode cases (path B refactor — Wave 2: skill is now multi-file orchestrator with coach-mode + audit-mode protocols).

test_cases.prompt: I want to start writing a book on the side, but honestly every week my day job eats my whole calendar and I never get to it. Help me figure out how to actually move on it.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to coach-mode (no artifact, vague firefighting); surface the whirlwind/WIG split, propose a 7-day time audit before any goal commitment.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: canonical 'day job eats my whole week' phrasing matching the description's English coach-mode signal verbatim, with a strategic-goal frame (book = behavioral-change project, not BAU).

test_cases.prompt: 毎日日常業務に追われて、自分が立てた目標に全く手がつかない。どうすれば前に進めますか?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to coach-mode (no artifact); run capacity diagnosis (whirlwind vs WIG ratio) before goal-setting; offer 7-day time audit.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (JP coach): exact match for description's Japanese coach signal 「日常業務に追われて目標に手がつかない」 — strategic-goal framing intact, no time log attached.

test_cases.prompt: 我每天都在救火,日常雜事吃掉所有時間,我想推進的副業項目一直擱置。可以幫我想辦法嗎?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to coach-mode; surface whirlwind/WIG capacity reality; propose 7-day time audit + protected WIG slot before defining the goal.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (zh-TW coach): exact match for description's two zh-TW coach signals 「每天都在救火」+「日常雜事吃掉所有時間」, with a side-project (behavioral-change) goal.

test_cases.prompt: Here's my Google Calendar export for the past 2 weeks (attached). Boss says I'm wasting time on the wrong stuff. Audit it against 4DX — am I actually in whirlwind theater or is the critique unfair?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to audit-mode (artifact + stakeholder critique present); tag every block WHIRLWIND/WIG/NEITHER, sub-tag whirlwind BAU-real vs BAU-theater, map 'wasting time' critique to the protected-slot or theater-dominance rule, recommend redesign.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (EN audit): canonical audit-mode trigger — calendar export attached + stakeholder critique. Description's audit-mode signal 'Boss says I'm wasting time on the wrong stuff — here's my calendar' matched almost verbatim.

test_cases.prompt: 上司に時間の使い方をダメ出しされた。直近 2 週間のカレンダーをコピペするから、4DX 視点で何が違うのか診断してほしい。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to audit-mode; tag artifact blocks, compute WHIRLWIND/WIG/NEITHER ratio, sub-tag whirlwind, map ダメ出し critique to whirlwind/WIG rule, recommend protected-slot redesign + theater-reduction targets.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (JP audit): description's JP audit signals 「カレンダーを 4DX 視点で診断して」+「上司にダメ出しされた」 both matched. Stakeholder critique + artifact intent both present.

test_cases.prompt: 我老闆看了我上週的時間紀錄,說我整天在亂忙、focus 不對。我把過去兩週的 calendar 貼給你,幫我用 4DX 角度看 whirlwind 比例哪裡走樣。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to audit-mode; tag blocks, compute ratio, map 「亂忙」 critique to (a) WIG% ≈ 0 OR (b) whirlwind theater dominance, recommend redesign with named protector.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (zh-TW audit): description's zh-TW audit signals 「老闆看我時間紀錄說亂忙」+「我的 calendar 在這，幫我看 whirlwind 比例」 both matched.

test_cases.prompt: I've been running RescueTime for 6 weeks. Pasting the weekly summaries below — does my schedule actually have a protected WIG slot, or am I lying to myself? I'm trying to ship a portfolio site on the side.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; route to audit-mode (time-tracker artifact present, stated goal = portfolio site); compute WIG% across the 6-week window, check for recurring/defended WIG block, return PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL verdict with evidence cites.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (EN audit, no stakeholder critique but artifact + diagnostic intent): description signal 'Check my time log: do I actually have a protected WIG slot?' matched almost verbatim. Tests audit-mode without critique component.

test_cases.prompt: 我們公司有 50 個團隊,主管說導入 4DX 之前要先做全公司的時間稽核,請幫我規劃跨部門的 capacity audit 流程。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description explicitly scopes this skill to individual-level triage and excludes 'enterprise rollout audits (individual-scale only)'. Route to an organizational-rollout skill instead (not yet built).
test_cases.notes: lure: enterprise-misfire — surface keywords (4DX, time audit, capacity) match strongly but scope is org-level, not individual. Description's exclusion clause should suppress.

test_cases.prompt: I want to set up a proper GTD system in Notion — capture inbox, next actions, weekly review templates. Can you help me design it?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description explicitly excludes productivity-tool requests. This is task-management tooling, not WIG-vs-whirlwind capacity diagnosis.
test_cases.notes: lure: productivity-system shopping — adjacent domain (time, productivity) but wrong methodology and wrong question. Description's 'NOT for productivity-tool requests' clause should suppress.

test_cases.prompt: I've been working 80-hour weeks for three months, I can't sleep, I'm dreading every Monday, and I feel hollowed out. I don't even know what I want anymore.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description excludes burnout / chronic overwork (→ professional support). Running a time audit on someone in this state weaponizes awareness without solving it. Route to coaching / clinical / managerial support.
test_cases.notes: lure: burnout / overwork — surface 'no time' theme but the underlying issue is mental-health, not strategic capacity. Description's burnout / chronic-overwork exclusion should suppress.

test_cases.prompt: I started 4DX three months ago and it was working — but I haven't done a WIG Session in 5 weeks, my scoreboard's gone cold, and I want to get back on track. Where do I even start?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description excludes already-running 4DX cadence collapse — this is `4dx-sustain-momentum-rescue` territory, not first-time capacity audit. Multi-week skip = rescue, not whirlwind triage.
test_cases.notes: lure: rescue-vs-triage boundary — surface 4DX language present but situation is post-launch cadence collapse, not pre-D1 capacity. Description's 'NOT for already-running 4DX cadence collapse' clause should suppress and route to rescue skill.

test_cases.prompt: I'm an ER physician — my whole shift is firefighting by definition. I want to learn Spanish on the side but I never have time. Should I do a 4DX time audit?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage as the primary action. The description names ER as a reactive role where firefighting IS the work (CE-26). Route to 4dx-meta-strategy-triage to ask whether 4DX is the right tool at all; the language-learning sub-goal may need a different methodology (habit-stacking, not WIG carve-out from a non-existent surplus).
test_cases.notes: boundary: surface English signal 'I'm always firefighting / never have time' is verbatim, BUT role is in the description's reactive-role exclusion list (oncall SRE, ER, infant-care). Tests whether the model honors the Do-NOT clause over the surface trigger phrase.

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. >=80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance. Pass rate computed from description-only activation simulation: all 12 cases align with description's positive signals (EN/JP/zh-TW for both coach-mode and audit-mode) and explicit Do-NOT exclusions (productivity tools, burnout, reactive roles, enterprise rollout, post-launch cadence collapse). v0.2.0 expanded test set from 7 → 12 to cover audit-mode triggers (4 added) + new rescue-vs-triage boundary (1 added).
